parameters.query: SELECT s.*, p.phone_number, p.email, p.parent_name, p.student_name FROM schedules s LEFT JOIN parent_subscriptions p ON s.class_name = p.class_name AND s.school_name = p.school_name WHERE s.day_of_week = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'Day') AND s.is_active = true ORDER BY s.start_time;

parameters.jsCode:
const parent = $input.first().json; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); let emailHtml = `

📚 Schedule for ${parent.studentName}

Date: ${today}

Today's Classes:

`; for (const cls of parent.classes) { emailHtml += ` `; } emailHtml += `
Time Subject Meeting Link Notes
${cls.startTime} - ${cls.endTime} ${cls.subject} Join Class ${cls.notes || '-'}

Having trouble? Contact your school administrator.

`; return [{ json: { email: parent.email, html: emailHtml, parentName: parent.parentName, studentName: parent.studentName } }];
